name: Rosette
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat to 365°F using an electric skillet.
2. Sift the flour before measuring.
3. Mix the milk, sugar, and salt with the beaten egg.
4. Slowly stir this mixture into the flour until smooth.
5. Heat the iron by dipping it in hot shortening (at 365°F) for 10 seconds.
6. Remove from the shortening and dip evenly to the top of the iron.
7. Quickly dip back into the shortening as soon as the batter begins to puff up on the iron.
8. Gently lift and allow the rosette to drop off.
9. When browned on one side, turn over and brown the other side.
10. Drain on absorbent paper.
11. Store in a tightly covered container; sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving. Makes 60.
